item.name: Splendid Natron
item.description:
While the Qitari use this rare substance as an ingredient in cleansing solutions, some suspect that it merely masks odors rather than eliminating them. Several members of the community rub this on the more pungent areas of the body as a substitute to proper washing, a practice that is largely frowned upon.

※Only for use in Qitari society quests.
※Not included in the gathering log.
